body: Implemented dashboard lifecycle parity: task create/update/status/reopen APIs and UI; issue detail/update/close APIs and UI; fresh readiness/blockers and ledger-root disclosure; coded client diagnostics; invalid-action explanations. Verification: 190 tests pass, typecheck clean, Biome clean, Vite production build clean, compiled binary rebuilt, validate 0 errors. No SyntaxError: Unexpected end of input.
